title: Software Update - DFU is not available if phone's battery is below 30%
scenario: DFU is blocked with low battery warning pop-up when phone battery is below 30%
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Ensure the phone's battery level is below 30%.
4. In Device Settings, locate and tap on the option for Device Firmware Update (DFU).
5. Observe the pop-up that appears on the screen.
6. Tap the OK button on the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The DFU process should not start. A pop-up appears stating the device battery doesn't have enough power to update, advising the user to fully charge or plug into a power source. Tapping OK dismisses the pop-up and returns the user to Settings without starting the update.
